notes: App boots into a playable level at '/'. Drive and verify via window.shelfRushQa (present in this qa build only). Cells are addressed as (compartment, cell); read getState().board to map shelves to products.

flows.name: level_1_guided_match
flows.description: Level 1's guided first move completes a triple (shelf 1 cell 0 -> shelf 0 cell 2).

flows.name: booster_no_consume_on_noop_P0_1
flows.description: An owned booster used where it cannot apply must NOT be consumed. Hammer needs a selected product; using it with nothing selected is a no-op, so the count is unchanged.

flows.name: replay_grants_no_coins_P0_2
flows.description: Re-winning an already-completed level grants no coins, and the win panel shows no coin row. Win a level, record getState (or the coin HUD), replay and win again; the coin balance must not increase the second time.
